svg.title: Progress note format comparison – SOAP, DAP, BIRP
svg.desc: Side-by-side comparison of three psychology progress note formats: SOAP, DAP, and BIRP.
svg.text: Consistency matters more than which format you choose — pick one and apply it every session
Most widely recognised format across health disciplines
Best for: medico-legal clarity, multi-disciplinary teams
Simpler, faster — suits most therapy sessions
combines S and O from SOAP
Best for: straightforward therapy, low-complexity sessions
Highlights clinical action and client response
at the start of the session
Best for: linking clinical action directly to client response
psychvault.com.au — clinical documentation resources for Australian psychologists
